BP07-001.question: If I have 2 copies of this follower on my field, and I summon a Naterran Great Tree token, will I gain 2 play points?
If a Naterran Great Tree token is put onto my field during an opponent's turn, will I gain a play point with this follower's automatic ability?

BP07-002.question: If I have 2 copies of this follower on my field, and I summon a Naterran Great Tree token, will I gain 2 play points?
If a Naterran Great Tree token is put onto my field during an opponent's turn, will I gain a play point with this follower's automatic ability?

BP07-003.question: I have a Fairy with Storm on the field due to this follower's passive ability. If I use it to attack an opponent's leader, and an opponent destroys this follower with a Quick card such as Execution, will my attack still go through?
If I can't put a Fairy Wisp token into my EX area, do I still give each Pixie token on my field +2 attack?

BP07-004.question: If my field is full, and I have 4 Natura cards on my field, can I bury them to summon this follower?
If I summon a Wildwood Matriarch with this follower's Fanfare ability, will the Wildwood Matriarch evolve with its Fanfare ability?

If I bury 4 Naterran Great Tree tokens when playing this follower, and I discard an Elf follower that costs 5 or less with a Naterran Great Tree's automatic ability, can I summon that Elf follower with this follower's Fanfare ability?
BP07-004.answer: Yes. Since Naterran Great Tree's automatic ability and this follower's Fanfare ability are triggered at the same time, you can resolve them in any order. If you resolve Naterran Great Tree's automatic ability first and discard the Elf follower, you can use this follower's Fanfare ability to summon it from the cemetery.

BP07-004.question: If I discard this follower during my end phase because I have too many cards in my hand, do I put a Naterran Great Tree token into my EX area?

BP07-005.question: An opponent changes my follower into an amulet with Izudia, Omen of Unkilling's Fanfare ability. During my turn, if only that follower is put into the cemetery from my field, do I give this follower +2/+2 at the start of my end phase?
BP07-005.answer: No. Since it has been turned into an amulet, it is no longer considered a follower.

BP07-005.question: During my turn, if only follower tokens were put into the cemetery from my field, do I give this follower +2/+2 at the start of my end phase?
BP07-005.answer: Yes. Follower tokens are considered followers, and they are removed from play only after being placed in the cemetery.

BP07-006.question: An opponent changes my follower into an amulet with Izudia, Omen of Unkilling's Fanfare ability. During my turn, if only that follower is put into the cemetery from my field, do I give this follower +2/+2 at the start of my end phase?
BP07-006.answer: No. Since it has been turned into an amulet, it is no longer considered a follower.

BP07-006.question: During my turn, if only follower tokens were put into the cemetery from my field, do I give this follower +2/+2 at the start of my end phase?
BP07-006.answer: Yes. Follower tokens are considered followers, and they are removed from play only after being placed in the cemetery.

BP07-011.question: If I give a Pixie follower in my EX area +1 attack with this spell, then summon that follower, does it keep its +1 attack?
BP07-011.answer: Yes. When an effect is applied to a card in the EX area, that effect will persist even if the card is played or summoned.

BP07-011.question: If I can't select any Pixie followers, can I play this spell?
BP07-011.answer: Yes. "Select up to 2" means you can select 0. Also, if you've played at least 3 cards this turn, you can draw a card even if you don't select any Pixie followers.

BP07-011.question: Can I select a Pixie follower from both my field and my EX area?
BP07-011.answer: Yes. You can also select 2 Pixie followers from either your field or your EX area.

BP07-012.question: If I play this follower from my EX area, do I deal 2 damage instead?
BP07-012.answer: Yes. Although the EX area may act like your hand, it isn't considered your hand.

BP07-017.question: If my EX area is full, can I still play this spell?
BP07-017.answer: Yes. Since your EX area is full, if you play this spell, it will have no effect. However, if you've played at least 3 cards this turn, you will give your leader 2 defense.

BP07-018.question: If my field is full, do I have to put a Naterran Great Tree token into my EX area instead?

BP07-020.question: If I have a Princess's Strike in my cemetery, but there are no valid targets for it, how should I resolve this follower's Fanfare ability?
BP07-020.answer: First, select the Princess's Strike in your cemetery. Then, because there are no valid targets for it, you won't be able to play it, so nothing happens, and it will remain in your cemetery.

BP07-020.question: Do I have to select a Princess's Strike from my cemetery with this follower's Fanfare ability?
After I resolve this follower's Fanfare ability, do I put the Princess's Strike back into my cemetery?
Can I activate this follower's ability multiple times in a turn?

BP07-022.question: If an opponent attacks me with this follower, can I select and destroy it with a Quick card such as Execution?
BP07-022.answer: Yes. In order to attack with this follower, your opponent has to engage it. Therefore, this follower will lose its Intimidate and Aura, allowing you to target it with a Quick card.

BP07-023.question: If an opponent attacks me with this follower, can I select and destroy it with a Quick card such as Execution?
BP07-023.answer: Yes. In order to attack with this follower, your opponent has to engage it. Therefore, this follower will lose its Intimidate and Aura, allowing you to target it with a Quick card.

BP07-024.question: If I have a Bayleon, Sovereign Light and 2 reserved Naterran Great Tree tokens on my field, can I engage the Naterran Great Tree tokens to play this spell for 0 cost?

BP07-030.question: If my field is full, do I have to put a Naterran Great Tree token into my EX area instead?

BP07-032.question: How should I resolve this follower's Last Words ability?
BP07-032.answer: Last Words triggers when the card is put into the cemetery. First, remove this follower from the cemetery and put it faceup on top of its owner's evolve deck. Then, put the unevolved form into its owner's EX area to resolve the ability.

BP07-033.question: If both my field and EX area are full, can I still play this spell?
BP07-033.answer: Yes. However, since both your field and EX area are full, this spell will have no effect.

BP07-034.question: If I select an engaged enemy follower, do I still draw a card?
BP07-034.answer: Yes. Since the enemy follower is already engaged, you can't engage it, but you do draw a card.

BP07-034.question: If I discard this spell during my end phase because I have too many cards in my hand, do I select an enemy follower on the field and engage it?

BP07-035.question: If I have a Delta Cannon in my cemetery, and I summon Tetra, Sapphire Rebel, in what order should I resolve their abilities?
BP07-035.answer: Since both abilities are triggered simultaneously, you may resolve them in any order. However, if there are 4 cards in your EX area, the order in which you decide to resolve them determines which card is put into your EX area. If you decide to resolve Tetra, Sapphire Rebel's Fanfare ability first, you will put a Repair Mode into your EX area. Then, since your EX area is full, you can't put Delta Cannon into your EX area with its automatic ability. Likewise, if you decide to resolve Delta Cannon's automatic ability first, you will put it into your EX area. Then, since your EX area is full, you can't put a Repair Mode into your EX area with Tetra, Sapphire Rebel's Fanfare ability.

BP07-036.question: If I have two copies of this follower on the field, does each Machina card in my EX area cost 2 less to play?
If I have two copies of this follower on the field, does each copy's automatic ability trigger whenever I play a Machina card?
BP07-036.answer: Yes. Each copy's automatic ability can trigger up to 4 times per turn.

BP07-036.question: If I play a Machina card during an opponent's turn, do I select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage?
BP07-036.answer: Yes. This follower's automatic ability applies up to 4 times per turn, no matter whose turn it is.

BP07-037.question: If I summon multiple Machina followers with Fanfare abilities with this follower's Fanfare ability, in what order should I resolve their abilities?
BP07-037.answer: Since the Fanfare abilities of the Machina followers are triggered simultaneously, you may resolve them in any order after you resolve this follower's Fanfare ability.

BP07-038.question: When playing this follower's Fanfare ability, if I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still choose option 1 to have nothing happen?
BP07-038.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower, you would be required to choose either option 2 or option 3.

BP07-038.question: When choosing multiple options, can I choose the same option multiple times?

I have given this follower the Last Words ability "Banish this card" with its activated ability, and there is a Staircase to Paradise on my field. Do I put a soul counter on Staircase to Paradise when this follower is destroyed?
BP07-038.answer: Yes. Before this follower is banished, it is first put into the cemetery, triggering Last Words and Staircase to Paradise's automatic ability simultaneously.

BP07-038.question: Can I play this follower's activated ability only while it's in my cemetery?

BP07-041.question: Will this spell's automatic ability trigger only while it's in my cemetery?
If I have a Delta Cannon in my cemetery, and I summon Tetra, Sapphire Rebel, in what order should I resolve their abilities?
BP07-041.answer: Since both abilities are triggered simultaneously, you may resolve them in any order. However, if there are 4 cards in your EX area, the order in which you decide to resolve them determines which card is put into your EX area. If you decide to resolve Tetra, Sapphire Rebel's Fanfare ability first, you will put a Repair Mode into your EX area. Then, since your EX area is full, you can't put Delta Cannon into your EX area with its automatic ability. Likewise, if you decide to resolve Delta Cannon's automatic ability first, you will put it into your EX area. Then, since your EX area is full, you can't put a Repair Mode into your EX area with Tetra, Sapphire Rebel's Fanfare ability.

BP07-044.question: If I play a Machina card during an opponent's turn, do I draw a card?
BP07-044.answer: Yes. This follower's automatic ability applies up to once per turn, no matter whose turn it is.

BP07-046.question: If I have 3 Machina cards in my EX area, and I play this follower's activated ability, do I deal 2 damage to an enemy follower?
BP07-046.answer: Yes. Since you have to banish a Machina card in your EX area as part of the cost to play this follower's activated ability, there will only be 2 Machina cards in your EX area when the activated ability resolves.

BP07-050.question: If an opponent has a Harvest Festival on their field, and I put it on the bottom of its owner's deck with this spell, can they draw a card with Harvest Festival's automatic ability before they summon a follower or amulet from their hand?
BP07-050.answer: No. You must finish resolving this spell's ability before Harvest Festival's triggered ability.

BP07-053.question: If I have a Shadow's Corrosion in my cemetery, but there are no valid targets for it, how should I resolve option 2 of this follower's On Evolve ability?
BP07-053.answer: First, select the Shadow's Corrosion in your cemetery. Then, because there are no valid targets for it, you won't be able to play it, so nothing will happen, and it will remain in your cemetery.

BP07-053.question: After I resolve option 2 of this follower's On Evolve ability, do I put the Shadow's Corrosion back into my cemetery?
BP07-053.answer: No. Since you have a Valdain, Cursed Shadow on the field, you will put the Shadow's Corrosion into your EX area with its ability.

BP07-053.question: When playing this follower's On Evolve ability, if I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still choose option 1 to search my deck for a Shadow's Corrosion?
BP07-053.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower, you would be required to choose option 2. Likewise, if you can't select a Shadow's Corrosion in your cemetery, you would be required to choose option 1. If you can't make the prerequisite selection for either option, then you can't play this follower's On Evolve ability.

BP07-055.question: If I discard this follower, can I choose not to use its ability?
BP07-055.answer: Yes. In that case, nothing will happen.

BP07-055.question: If I discard this follower during my end phase because I have too many cards in my hand, can I pay 1 play point to deal 3 damage to an enemy follower on the field?

BP07-058.question: If I have two copies of this spell in my EX area and 5 Natura cards in my cemetery, do I deal 2 damage to each enemy leader at the start of my end phase?
BP07-058.answer: Yes. Each copy's automatic ability will trigger.

BP07-058.question: If I have this spell in my EX area and 10 Natura cards in my cemetery, do I deal 2 damage to each enemy leader at the start of my end phase?
BP07-058.answer: Yes. If you have at least 5 Natura cards in your cemetery, you will deal 1 damage. If you have at least 10 Natura cards, you will deal 2, and so on.

BP07-058.question: If I have this spell in my EX area and a Star Phoenix in my cemetery, and this spell's automatic ability triggers at the start of my end phase, can I pay 1 play point to summon the Star Phoenix with its activated ability?
BP07-058.answer: No. Resolving an automatic ability is not the same as playing a spell.

BP07-058.question: If I have a Valdain, Cursed Shadow on my field, and I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still play this spell and put it into my EX area?
BP07-058.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower on the field, you can't play this spell.

BP07-063.question: If I have this follower on my field, and I attack with a Dragonewt follower, do I resolve this follower's ability before an opponent can play cards and abilities with Quick?
BP07-063.answer: Yes. When attacking, all abilities that are triggered must be resolved before non-active players can play cards and abilities with Quick.

BP07-064.question: If Overflow is active for me, can I choose not to summon a Naterran Great Tree token with this follower's Fanfare ability?
BP07-064.answer: Yes. "Summon up to 2" means you can summon 0. Also, if you choose not to summon a Naterran Great Tree token, you can still give this follower Rush.

BP07-068.question: If Overflow is active for me, can I choose not to summon a Naterran Great Tree token?
BP07-068.answer: Yes. "Summon up to 3" means you can summon 0.

BP07-069.question: If an opponent changes an Assembly Drone on my field into an amulet with Izudia, Omen of Unkilling's Fanfare effect, can I still activate this follower's evolve ability?

BP07-075.question: Can I choose to add a Mono, Garnet Rebel to my hand from my cemetery with option 1?
BP07-075.answer: Yes. If you choose option 1, you may add Mono, Garnet Rebel to your hand instead of summoning it.

BP07-075.question: Can I play this card if there are no valid targets in my cemetery?
BP07-075.answer: No. If you can't select a Machina follower or Mono, Garnet Rebel in your cemetery, you can't play this card.

BP07-084.question: Can I give Bane to a Baccherus, Peppy Ghostie with this follower's activated ability?
BP07-084.answer: Yes. Baccherus, Peppy Ghostie is also considered a Ghost while on the field.

BP07-086.question: If I play this follower's activated ability 8 times this turn, does it cost -1 to evolve this turn?
BP07-086.answer: Technically, yes. However, when it comes to paying that cost, that negative value is treated as 0, so it will cost 0 play points to evolve this turn.

BP07-086.question: If I play this follower's activated ability twice this turn, does it cost 5 to evolve this turn?

BP07-088.question: If I have this follower and an Enstatued Seraph on my field, in what order should I resolve their "at the start of your end phase" abilities?
BP07-088.answer: You may resolve them in any order.

BP07-089.question: If my EX area is full, do I still gain 2 play points with this follower's Fanfare ability?

BP07-093.question: If I have 1 or less cards in my deck, can I still play this follower's activated ability?
BP07-093.answer: Yes. If you have 1 or less cards, you will place this card on the bottom of your deck.

BP07-094.question: If my EX area is full, and I have at least 3 Repair Mode tokens in my EX area, do I still give this follower +1 attack with its Strike ability?

BP07-095.question: If my EX area is full, and I have at least 3 Repair Mode tokens in my EX area, do I still give this follower +1 attack with its Strike ability?

BP07-096.question: If I search my deck with this follower's Fanfare ability, don't I have to reveal the card I searched for?
BP07-096.answer: No. Whenever instructed to search for a card with specific features, you have to reveal it to prove that it meets the conditions specified. However, since this follower's Fanfare ability does not specify the kind of card, you don't have to reveal it.

BP07-102.question: If I don't have a card with "Meowskers" in its name in my hand, can I still pay 1 play point and bury this amulet with its activated ability?

BP07-103.question: When playing this follower's Fanfare ability, if I can't select an enemy follower or an enemy amulet on the field, can I still choose option 1 or option 2 to have nothing happen?
BP07-103.answer: No. If you can't select a suitable target for an option, you would be required to choose a different option. However, you may choose to not pay the ability's cost to have nothing happen.

BP07-103.question: When choosing multiple options, can I choose the same option multiple times?

BP07-104.question: I attack an enemy Underworld Watchman Khawy with this follower and both are destroyed. If I resummon this follower and evolve it with its Last Words ability, can my opponent destroy it with the Last Words ability of their Underworld Watchman Khawy?
BP07-104.answer: Yes. Both this follower and the enemy Underworld Watchman Khawy are destroyed at the same time, triggering both Last Words abilities. Since you are the active player, you must resolve your pending abilities before your opponent can resolve theirs. Therefore, the evolved version of this follower will be on the field when your opponent resolves the Last Words ability of their Underworld Watchman Khawy.

BP07-104.question: I put this follower into my EX area from an opponent's cemetery with the On Evolve ability of Octrice, Omen of Usurpation. If I summon this follower, then it is destroyed, how should I resolve this follower's Last Words ability?
BP07-104.answer: If you pay the cost of this follower's Last Words ability, it will be put onto its owner's field before being banished. 1. When this follower is destroyed, it goes into its owner's cemetery. 2. When it is put into the cemetery, its Last Words triggers, and you can choose whether or not to pay its cost. 3. If you choose to pay the cost, you would banish a Naterran Great Tree from your field or EX area. 4. You would then put this follower onto your opponent's field engaged. 5. You would then evolve it. However, it can only be evolved by revealing its evolved form from its master's evolve deck. It is on your opponent's field, so your opponent is its master, and their evolve deck is a private zone, so you can't evolve it. 6. Since this follower wasn't evolved, it would be banished.

BP07-104.question: If I evolve this follower with its Last Words ability, can I evolve another follower using its evolve ability in the same turn?
BP07-104.answer: Yes. Although you can only activate one evolve ability per turn, other abilities that evolve followers do not count towards this limit.

BP07-104.question: Can I add this follower to my hand with Maid Leader's On Evolve ability?
BP07-104.answer: No. Although this follower has an ability that evolves it, it doesn't have an evolve ability.

BP07-107.question: If I have 3 Natura cards on my field or in my EX area, and I play this follower, do I look at the top 3 cards of my deck with its Fanfare ability?
BP07-107.answer: It depends. If you put a Naterran Great Tree token onto your field or into your EX area with this follower's Fanfare ability, you will have at least 5 Natura cards on your field and/or in your EX area, so you would look at the top 3 cards of your deck. However, if you choose not to put a Naterran Great Tree onto your field or into your EX area, you will only have 4 Natura cards on your field and/or in your EX area, so you wouldn't look at the top 3 cards of your deck.

BP07-107.question: If my field is full, do I have to put a Naterran Great Tree token into my EX area instead?

BP07-108.question: An opponent only has an engaged Bellringer Angel on the field, and I attack it with a Maisha, Hero of Purgation. If I play a Purgation's Blade with Maisha, Hero of Purgation's Strike ability to destroy the enemy Bellringer Angel, can I change the target of Maisha, Hero of Purgation's attack to their leader?
BP07-108.answer: No. Unless otherwise stated, you can't change the target of an attack, even if the original target leaves the field.

BP07-108.question: If I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still play a Purgation's Blade to give each Maisha, Hero of Purgation on my field attack equal to the number of followers in my cemetery?
BP07-108.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower on the field, you can't play a Purgation's Blade.

BP07-109.question: An opponent only has an engaged Bellringer Angel on the field, and I attack it with a Maisha, Hero of Purgation. If I play a Purgation's Blade with Maisha, Hero of Purgation's Strike ability to destroy the enemy Bellringer Angel, can I change the target of Maisha, Hero of Purgation's attack to their leader?
BP07-109.answer: No. Unless otherwise stated, you can't change the target of an attack, even if the original target leaves the field.

BP07-109.question: If I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still play a Purgation's Blade to give each Maisha, Hero of Purgation on my field attack equal to the number of followers in my cemetery?
BP07-109.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower on the field, you can't play a Purgation's Blade.

BP07-109.question: If I have 4 or less cards in my deck, can I still give this follower Storm with its On Evolve ability?
BP07-109.answer: Yes. Whenever you are required to bury more cards than you have, you will bury as many cards as possible before resolving the rest of the effect. You also can't lose the game as a result of resolving a bury effect.

BP07-112.question: If I don't put a Naterran Great Tree token onto my field or into my EX area with this follower's Fanfare ability, do I still give my leader 1 defense?
If my field is full, do I have to put a Naterran Great Tree token into my EX area instead?

BP07-113.question: An opponent only has an engaged Bellringer Angel on the field, and I attack it with a Maisha, Hero of Purgation. If I play a Purgation's Blade with Maisha, Hero of Purgation's Strike ability to destroy the enemy Bellringer Angel, can I change the target of Maisha, Hero of Purgation's attack to their leader?
BP07-113.answer: No. Unless otherwise stated, you can't change the target of an attack, even if the original target leaves the field.

BP07-113.question: If I can't select an enemy follower on the field, can I still play a Purgation's Blade to give each Maisha, Hero of Purgation on my field attack equal to the number of followers in my cemetery?
BP07-113.answer: No. If you can't select an enemy follower on the field, you can't play a Purgation's Blade.

BP07-117.question: If I banish a Naterran Great Tree token as part of the cost of this follower's Last Words ability, do I resolve the Naterran Great Tree's triggered ability after resolving this follower's Last Words ability?
If I don't find another copy of this follower in my deck with this follower's Last Words ability, do I still give my leader 1 defense?
